segment.source: A two-column layout pairing a wide rich-text main column with a narrow sidebar card, switchable left or right, plus an optional heading. Use it for: article bodies with side notes, guides with a fact or contact box, service pages with related links — any long text where supporting context belongs beside the copy. Prefer 'Split Text & Media' when the second column is an image; 'Content Columns' splits one text into equal columns instead.
